description_long: This object is a modern tactical rifle, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a long, cylindrical barrel with a suppressor attached at the muzzle, and a prominent handguard with a ribbed texture for grip. The receiver is angular and robust, with a pistol grip and a trigger guard below. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, and the overall silhouette is sleek and utilitarian, designed for both functionality and ease of handling. The materials appear to be primarily matte-finished metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement rifles. The color is uniformly dark, enhancing its low-visibility profile for urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, detachable magazine, and iron sights, finished in matte black metal and polymer.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: A left-side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, handguard, and suppressor.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: A right-side view shows the same features as the left, with details of the magazine, trigger, and handguard visible.
